query:
SELECT 
  c.id as client_id, 
  c.name as client_name, 
  c.whatsappPhone, 
  c.userId,
  u.name as user_name,
  u.email as user_email,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE clientId = c.id) as appointment_count
FROM clients c
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Alvaro%' OR c.name LIKE '%Alvaro%'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
